name: rabbit-auto-evolve
summary: rabbit-auto-evolve — self-driving rabbit loop that continuously fetches open rabbit-managed issues, triages, dispatches TDD subagents, merges PRs into dev, tags releases, and reschedules via ScheduleWakeup until the user issues an explicit stop.
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code or rabbit gains a native always-on autonomous-agent mode that supersedes this skill
spec_no_change_reason: spec change for Inv 24 already landed in commit 84921e5 (spec.md frontmatter at v0.8.1)
